---
title: "Lab 4b: Geocoding with Privacy"
subtitle: "Intro GIS for Public Health · ArcGIS Online track · Day 4"
---

::: {.lab-download}
[Download this lab (Word)](downloads/Lab04b_Geocoding_ArcGISOnline_PH.docx){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm download="Lab04b_Geocoding_ArcGISOnline_PH.docx"}
[ArcGIS Pro version (Word)](downloads/Lab04b_Geocoding_ArcGISPro_PH.docx){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm download="Lab04b_Geocoding_ArcGISPro_PH.docx"}
:::

{{< include _lab4b-online.md >}}
